overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence depicting a first-person walk through a stormy night at an abandoned coastal railway station. The camera moves from alongside a corrugated metal barn, approaches a covered platform where a lone figure stands holding an object, then continues past to reveal a windswept cliffside with a dilapidated shack overlooking turbulent waters and distant docks.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned railway approach alongside warehouse wall

events.description: moving past the barn wall reveals railway tracks and distant platform structure
slight increase in ambient visibility as moving away from the barn shadow

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the corrugated metal barn wall, turning slightly to face the railway tracks

notable_agents.action: stationary figure standing on the distant platform holding an object

entered.detail: weathered corrugated metal siding of the barn structure
large wooden X-braced gate on the barn
brick wall covered in dense green ivy
metal railway tracks extending toward the platform
distant covered railway platform with wooden roof

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in near-total darkness alongside a corrugated metal barn. As the camera walks forward, a brick wall covered in ivy appears on the left, and railway tracks come into view leading toward a distant covered platform. A lone figure stands motionless on the platform in the distance, barely visible in the stormy night.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered railway platform with wooden support pillars

events.description: stepping onto the wooden platform deck from the gravel approach
passing close by the stationary NPC on the left side of the platform
moving deeper under the platform roof creates darker shadows overhead

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing the stationary NPC on the platform, moving under the wooden roof structure

notable_agents.action: standing motionless on the platform holding what appears to be a baby or wrapped bundle

entered.detail: sloped wooden shingle roof of the platform shelter
thick timber support beams holding up the roof structure
weathered wooden planks of the platform walking surface

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the covered platform along the tracks, drawing close to a lone figure standing motionless on the left. Passing under the wooden roof structure, the thick support pillars frame the view ahead. The platform deck transitions from gravel to weathered wood as the camera moves through the sheltered area toward the open coastline beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: stormy coastal cliffside with abandoned shack

events.description: exiting the covered platform reveals the open stormy coastline and sea
full view of the turbulent water and distant docks comes into view as passing the shack

agents.ego_description: walking along the cliff edge past the wooden shack, overlooking the stormy sea

entered.detail: small dilapidated wooden house with stairs leading down to the water
rough dark water with whitecaps under heavy storm clouds
distant pier structures with vertical masts along the shoreline
jagged rocks and broken wooden debris along the waterline

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the platform roof, the scene opens to a windswept coastal landscape. A dilapidated wooden shack sits on the cliff edge to the left, while the turbulent stormy sea stretches into the darkness ahead. The camera continues along the grassy cliff path, revealing distant docks and rocky shoreline to the right as the platform recedes behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the oppressive darkness of a railway siding into a vast, windswept coastal expanse. It begins in near-total darkness alongside a corrugated metal barn, moving past an ivy-covered brick wall as railway tracks emerge to lead toward a distant, covered platform where a lone figure stands. As the camera approaches and passes under the wooden roof structure, the ground transitions from gravel to weathered wood, with thick support pillars framing the path forward. The scene then opens abruptly as the camera emerges from the shelter onto a grassy cliffside, revealing a dilapidated wooden shack perched on the edge. Finally, the view expands across the turbulent stormy sea toward distant docks and a rocky shoreline as the platform recedes into the darkness.
